title: Better IPN Buttons
description: A resource pack to change the IPN buttons to black.
body:
# ✨ Better IPN Buttons

A resource pack to change the IPN buttons to black.

## ⚙️ Requirements

[Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/project/O7RBXm3n)

## 🙏 Credits

Thanks to [qupinator](https://modrinth.com/user/mC1yXHZ2) to the original resource pack [Dark icons for IPN](https://modrinth.com/project/bP3viRCL).

## 📦 Modpack

Feel free to include Better IPN Buttons in modpacks.

## 🌐 Looking for a server? Support me at the same time!

Want to play with friends? Get your own server with [Wabbanode](http://wabbanode.com/affiliate/wildlight).

Use the code **WILDLIGHT** to support me and get 25% off.
